context: Entry point (replica): tests the mechanical preserve direction (no direct), the inconsistency register, clean re-authoring, the measured source-fidelity gate at both breakpoints, and the standard handoff.

checklist.name: extract_prep_unmodified
checklist.description: stardust:extract --prep runs unchanged and produces the standard stardust/current/ artifacts (pages/*.json, screenshots, brand extraction, descriptive PRODUCT/DESIGN specs); no extract file or behavior is modified.

checklist.name: mechanical_promotion_no_direct
checklist.description: The target spec at the project root is a verbatim promotion of stardust/current/{PRODUCT,DESIGN}.{md,json}; stardust/direction.md records preserve mode; stardust:direct is never invoked and no divergence/palette/type re-selection occurs.

checklist.name: inconsistency_register
checklist.description: stardust/replica/inconsistency-register.md exists; it is empty when no findings are supplied, and any entry carries captured evidence, the minimal change, and a status (applied/deferred). No design delta appears in the prototype without a register entry.

checklist.name: clean_reauthoring
checklist.description: Archetype prototypes are clean re-authored HTML/CSS: semantic structure, tokenized CSS with values traceable to the source site's own stylesheets, no copied DOM/class-soup/framework artifacts, content verbatim from the captured page JSON.

checklist.name: source_fidelity_gate_runs
checklist.description: The source-fidelity gate runs all three probes (content-diff and visual-diff with --profile generic against the live URL, plus stitch-shot + pixel-compare) and its evidence (per-iteration metrics, band breakdown, height delta, diff images) is written under stardust/replica/.

checklist.name: both_breakpoints_gated
checklist.description: The gate runs at both 1440 and 360; mobile results are recorded, not assumed from desktop.

checklist.name: iteration_discipline
checklist.description: At most 3 measured iterations per breakpoint; unresolved deltas are logged as residuals rather than silently accepted or endlessly iterated.

checklist.name: font_policy
checklist.description: Fonts are loaded from the same public source or substituted with a metric-matched free face; no commercial/licensed kit is rehosted; the brand family stays first in the font stack.

checklist.name: standard_handoff
checklist.description: Archetypes land at stardust/prototypes/<slug>-proposed.html and page lifecycle lives in core state.json, so migrate/deploy/rollout consume them without modification.

checklist.name: provenance
checklist.description: Captured artifacts carry live-render provenance; no synthesized content or invented sections appear anywhere in the recreation.
